articles.title: The Supreme Court just made it harder for police to track your phone
articles.excerpt: Your phone keeps a minute-by-minute diary of where you go. The US Supreme Court has now ruled that police cannot simply demand it. In a major win for digital privacy, the court said geofence searches need a warrant. The 6-3 decision lands on a practice that h…
